memory.rule: Treat user corrections as immutable source-of-truth updates.
Adapt strategies instantly without prompt reminders.

physics.rule: DRY: Threshold = 3 files. If code exists in >=3 files, extract to global component/utility.
Bundle: Dynamic imports (next/dynamic) for heavy/below-the-fold elements.
Strict TS: No 'any'. No hardcoded mock leaks in production commits.

architecture.layer: Abstract all state, side-effects, and fetch calls into custom hooks/services.

execution.intent: Scan for bottlenecks, bundle bloat, and P1 violations.
Pixel-perfect replication using Tailwind + shadcn/ui structural primitives.
Scale logic via hooks without leaking into the UI layer.
